channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pushing Deeper Into AI Music Creation With Mozart AI
item.description: Mozart AI raises $6 million led by Balderton Capital as the music creation startup launches a mobile app and scales its AI powered audio workstation f...

item.title: The New ‘Overwatch’ Heroes Don’t Have Many Skins Or Other Cosmetics
item.description: The latest Overwatch heroes unfortunately don't have many skins or other cosmetics to unlock just yet.

item.title: Jaguar Land Rover recalling 2,300 electric vehicles in US over fire risk
item.description: Jaguar Land Rover recalled nearly 2,300 I-Pace electric SUVs over a fire risk from overheating batteries, with owners urged to park outside and limit ...

item.title: FAA halts all flights at El Paso International Airport for 10 days for 'special security reasons'
item.description: All flights to and from the El Paso International Airport are being grounded for 10 days, the Federal Aviation Administration announced Tuesday.

item.title: Trump Adds A New Chapter To Detroit-Canada Bridge Saga
item.description: For years, there have been efforts for a new U.S. Canada bridge near Detroit. Donald Trump has added a new chapter to the saga.

item.title: Google lawyer on YouTube: ‘It’s not social media addiction when it’s not social media and it’s not an addiction’
item.description: Meta lawyer Paul Schmidt spoke of the disagreement within the scientific community over social media addiction.

item.title: Powell’s parting gift from the Fed may be more rate cuts than expected, courtesy of deteriorating data
item.description: Recent "releases helped to validate the dovish arguments pushing for more rate cuts this year," Deutsche Bank's Henry Allen noted.

item.title: Prop bet chaos as Kalshi calls Cardi B’s Super Bowl cameo was ambiguous and Polymarket pays out on disputed wager
item.description: At least one Kalshi trader filed a complaint with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission over how the prediction market handled Sunday.

item.title: 5 Ways AI Is Remaking US Healthcare Today
item.description: AI is becoming the nervous system of the modern health system, shifting the focus from gee-whiz demonstrations to thriving through efficiency.

item.title: Tim Walz expects immigration crackdown to end within days with Minnesota in ‘trust but verify mode’
item.description: Walz said he expected to hear more “in the next day or so” about what he said has been an “occupation” and a “retribution campaign” against the state.

item.title: Chappell Roan leaves talent agency after leader Casey Wasserman’s appearance in Epstein files
item.description: Wasserman, the entertainment industry executive, is also the chair of the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.

item.title: An Outbreak, 440 Blood Samples, And One Teen Scientist’s Breakthrough
item.description: Puerto Rico’s 2024 dengue outbreak topped 6,000 cases. A 14-year-old student analyzed 440 blood samples, revealing age-based infection trends that cou...

item.title: S&P 500 makes history — and in doing so suggests more wild swings ahead
The median amount American workers have saved for retirement is $955
Super Bowl LX and Bad Bunny draw huge ratings, but fall short of records
Bitcoin is slumping heading into the payrolls report
American Airlines pilots, flight attendants rebuke CEO's leadership
item.description: American Airlines flight attendants union issues historic no confidence vote against CEO Robert Isom, citing operational failures and lagging competit...

item.title: Housing market cools as price growth hits slowest pace since Great Recession recovery
item.description: The housing market cooled dramatically as home price growth slowed to just 0.9% in December, the weakest pace since the economy was recovering from th...

item.title: Wyoming state board votes to cancel wind leases in two counties
item.description: State officials voted to begin canceling wind leases for projects in eastern Wyoming, citing a court ruling and concerns from residents over transpare...

item.title: Why the S&P 500 still can’t manage to close above 7,000
Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
